parents.subject: LU-18689 lov: missed lov_tgts_putref() in case of error

commit.subject: LU-18977 efalnd: Add support for parsing EFA LND NIDs
commit.message:
LU-18977 efalnd: Add support for parsing EFA LND NIDs

As preparation for AWS EFA LND support, add the needed logic to be able
to parse EFA NIDs.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=runtests,sanity-lnet serverversion=2.16
Change-Id: If0a4b68c45905a32195845ccbc5fe63b8978af06
Signed-off-by: Yonatan Nachum <ynachum@amazon.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59768
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
